name: @pyreon/example-native-viz
description: PRIVATE / EXPERIMENTAL — exhaustive multiplatform viz proof: ONE .tsx compiles to web + iOS + Android, hosting 21 distinct ECharts chart types (@pyreon/charts/webview), a flow diagram (@pyreon/flow/webview), a CodeMirror editor (@pyreon/code/webview), and a TipTap WYSIWYG (@pyreon/rich-text/webview) in native WebViews with the bidirectional data bridge (live forward push + reverse tap/edit-to-select).

scripts.build: bun run build:swift && bun run build:kotlin
scripts.lint: echo '[native-viz] no TS lint surface; skipping'
scripts.test: echo '[native-viz] no test surface; PMTC emit covered by @pyreon/native-compiler tests + the /webview browser suites'
scripts.typecheck: echo '[native-viz] @ts-nocheck on source; PMTC handles typing'
